title: Search Eureka
heading: Search Eureka
summary: Static handoff for Eureka public search. The local/prototype runtime exists, but hosted public search is not configured or verified.

sections.text: Public Search Static Handoff v0 is implemented as static publication only. This page does not make hosted search live and does not add backend hosting.

sample_queries: latest firefox before xp support ended

sections.text: The static handoff publishes data/search_handoff.json so old clients, static readers, and future rehearsal tooling can tell that hosted search is unavailable, local runtime instructions exist, local_index_only is the first mode, and unsafe behavior remains disabled.

items: Static site does not run Python.
Hosted backend status is unavailable or unverified unless future evidence says otherwise.
The local runtime uses server-owned local index records and rejects caller-provided local paths or URLs.
No live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, accounts, local path search, telemetry, arbitrary URL fetch, scraping, or crawling are enabled; API stability remains pre-production.
Public Search Rehearsal v0 remains future work.
